title: Historical statistics notices on the incidence of tuberculosis (TB) in cattle in Great Britain, 2025 - quarterly
body: "This publication gives previously published copies of the quarterly statistical publications on the incidence of tuberculosis (TB) in cattle for Great Britain in 2025. Each publication gives the figures that were available at that time. The figures are subject to revision each quarter as new information becomes available.  Get the latest quarterly statistics on tuberculosis (TB) in cattle in Great Britain   For further information please contact: tbstatistics@defra.gov.uk  X: @DefraStats   Media enquiries: 0207 238 6007 (Press Office)  "
